{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220814299C6271933F9B5BA61675"}"},"total":13},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7585777897435284286","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"内容不错，算是重新认识历史人物了[求爆更][顶帖][求关注]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766205966,"group_id":"7580207686491327550","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N47QiWvuOdMqxMo059iAebYrgYt8EBwv3MaZAZfNix0w","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8f3a2130e53d44d6b8690d97d3638c19~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704339&x-signature=vr8VcYfExUOJTwppc9aPz%2FOdoas%3D","user_id":"3368503867083192","user_name":"空奇の日奈"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3368503867083192","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7580207686491327550","book_info":{"abstract":"全球推演台降临蓝星。
人类文化历史遭到封锁。
每个国家需派出具有推演能力之人，算出推演台所给出的人物历程。
推演正确，获得丰厚奖励。
推演失败，选手死亡，其所在国家遭遇重大惩罚。
老鹰联盟派出通灵师，大本钟帝国派出占卜师，樱花国派出阴阳师……
陆风穿越至此，开局觉醒【华夏窥天诀】，掌握华夏所有推演之法。
当他正准备一展身手时。
结果发现……
推演台：
【朱重八，放牛娃，请推演出他最高身份】
【刘邦，街头混混，请推演出他最高身份】
【刘备，草鞋贩子，请推演出他最高身份】
【嬴政，人质之子，被赵国视为秦孽，请推演出他最高身份】
【东胜神洲傲来国花果山，一块石头，请推演出它最高身份】
其他选手因推演难度高，抓耳挠腮时。
穿越而来的陆风笑了，“不是？这么简单的问题，还用推演吗？”
……
答案揭晓，陆风全对。
全球观众震惊了。
“开局一个碗，结尾一个国？这是正经放牛娃吗？！”
“48岁看狗打架，54岁问鼎天下？这特么对劲吗？！”
“卖草鞋结识两员大将，然后一飞冲天？成为汉昭烈帝？”
“出生寄人篱下，巅峰横扫六国！一统天下！享万世功名，称千古一帝？！”
“不是？石头里蹦出个猴儿？它还成了斗战胜佛，自称齐天大圣？我疯了还是这个世界疯了？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/4e87e6eda8c81c9a696e00c8bb855eec~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"我不是团长","author_id":"","book_id":"7580207686491327550","book_name":"全球推演：世人不信朱元璋能称帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402018","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7580207717642420798","read_count":"127","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"104276"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"50","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,开局,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4e87e6eda8c81c9a696e00c8bb855eec~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779322469&x-signature=pcGwvHDhlcto3%2FOML0EVLCRq7Oo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"105681619537","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"22"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220814299C6271933F9B5BA61675"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读39分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count"
